name: Pizano's
teaser: My other plane pizza if I don't get Lou's. The tangy cheese stands out in a good way.
review: I get this for the plane if I don't get Lou's. I'm always surprised how different it tastes even though it looks roughly the same and is from the same lineage. I think the tangy cheese stands out in a good way.
headsUp: Great plane pizza. Travels better than you would expect for deep dish.
update: A reliable backup when Lou's is sold out. Sometimes better.
address: 61 E Madison St, Chicago, IL 60603, USA
hours: Monday: 11:00 AM – 11:00 PM · Tuesday: 11:00 AM – 11:00 PM · Wednesday: 11:00 AM – 11:00 PM · Thursday: 11:00 AM – 11:00 PM · Friday: 11:00 AM – 11:00 PM · Saturday: 11:00 AM – 11:00 PM · Sunday: 11:00 AM – 11:00 PM
